description.value:
The Bastardized Flame

The Suzaku Clan traces their origins back to the land of fire, long before the warring states period. They consecrated themselves as one of the first prominent clans of the fledgling nation. Benevolent and honorable above all else, they were believed to bear the blood of the Great Phoenix. A badge they proudly wore being mentors to the people wide-spreading the art of wielding fire. Though they lacked the potential for many of the other nature releases, their innate mastery of one was unmatched by even the greats of their era. Some legends say their members even ascended to sagehood. Shattering their once inability for the elements and allowing them "eternal" vigil over the land of fire against its enemies and nurturing it for future generations to come.

Alas, not even those with the blood of a creature of purity can stay untainted forever. As the decades went by and the land of fire grew more independent, new bloodlines began spreading their wings. They were forced to change with the times and spearheaded the defense of their land. Their numbers dwindled from the new enemies and the threat of the unknown ever-lurking within their homeland and infighting. With the slow unification of the land, the need for their Phoenix sage became ever-increasing. As animosity grew for the "immortal" protectors, many sought to attain the secrets for themselves. In the dawn of the warring state period, the last Phoenix sage fell to the hands of the enemy, and with them, the rest of the once-great teachers.

Many of the clan secrets have been lost to the ages, and they've been reduced to a footnote within the land of fire's past. Now, with the handful of the Phoenix's descendants left, they are nothing more than shells of what was. Whether it be as a rogue-nin or vindictive enforcers, whatever shred of fame has long since died, and in its place, a new flame sparked to life. While a rare sight to behold, many dread meeting them on the battlefield.

Suzaku Traits

Ability Score Increase: +2 Cha, +1 Wis
Speed: Your base walking speed is 30 feet.
Proficiencies: Chakra Control; Pick one between Martial Arts or Ninshou.
Fire Affinity: You begin with Fire Release Affinity. (You can learn Ninjutsu with the fire release Keyword.)
Elemental Release Inability: You cannot use or learn ninjutsu with the Water Release, Wind Release, Earth Release, or Lightning Release Keywords unless otherwise specified.
